finding_results.notes: Reduced repeated pain/numbing regulation beats by replacing scar-pressure/cold-water numbing responses with movement/task-regulation (chair grip, written action cue, timed readback), while retaining one high-impact bodily beat for texture variance.

Removed the future-biographical aside from the Cora call passage and kept only in-call perceivable or plausibly immediate inference detail, preserving uninterrupted urgent momentum into the subsequent exchange.

summary: All p3 prose/copyedit findings for chapter_13 were resolved with minimal collateral churn: stress-regulation beats were diversified to avoid autopilot repetition, and the urgent Cora call was tightened to close-third present-call perception without retrospective distance wobble.
